It’s... beautiful. But what could it be?
It’s... beautiful. But what could it be?
<WordWrap>Finally! That tricky Tikbalang has been causing so much trouble. I was trying to reach you sooner, but he was blocking my path!
We didn’t expect to see you here. Who are you?
We didn’t expect to see you here. Who are you?
<WordWrap>My name’s Luna, and I’ve been watching you. That Tikbalang was causing chaos, but thanks to your bravery, you’ve put an end to his tricks
<WordWrap>It wasn’t easy, but we couldn’t let him hurt anyone else.
<WordWrap>It wasn’t easy, but we couldn’t let him hurt anyone else.
<WordWrap>You did more than stop him. You’ve restored balance to this part of the forest. As a thank you, I’d like to give you something special.
<WordWrap>This will help you on your journey. I can sense you have many more challenges ahead, but with this, you’ll be even stronger.
Thank you so much! We’ll make good use of it
<WordWrap>Be careful, though. There are more dangers in this world, and not all of them are as playful as the Tikbalang. If you ever need help, seek me out in the forest. I’ll be watching over you.
We appreciate your help. Stay safe.
We appreciate your help. Stay safe.
